mapper.insert:
insert into wecom_group_member ( room_id, member_id, member_remark, user_type, join_time, join_scene, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.roomId}, #{item.memberId}, #{item.memberRemark}, #{item.userType}, #{item.joinTime}, #{item.joinScene}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: select distinct gm.member_id from wecom_group_member gm inner join ( select distinct room_id from wecom_message where room_id is not null and room_id != '' and msg_time >= #{activeFromTime} ) m on gm.room_id = m.room_id where gm.user_type = '2'

select distinct gm.member_id from wecom_group_member gm inner join ( select distinct room_id from wecom_message where room_id is not null and room_id != '' and msg_time >= #{activeFromTime} ) m on gm.room_id = m.room_id where gm.user_type = '1'
